ddls:
CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject the question belongs to */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the question (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "question_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the question (e.g., multiple-choice, true/false) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the question was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the question was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the question */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the question */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the question */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the question is active */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date and time the question was last used */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference or source of the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_question_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_type_id") REFERENCES question_types ("question_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  "level" TEXT /* Educational level of the subject */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the subject is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the subject was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_types" (
  "question_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question type */,
  "question_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the question type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the question type */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the question type is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the question type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question the option belongs to */,
  "option_text" TEXT /* Text of the option */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the option is the correct answer */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback for the option */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the option is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assessment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the assessment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assessment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assessment was last updated */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the assessment in minutes */,
  "passing_score" INTEGER /* Passing score for the assessment */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the assessment is active */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date and time the assessment was last used */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_questions" (
  "assessment_question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment-question link */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question */,
  "sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the question in the assessment */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points assigned to the question */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the question is active in the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_questions_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_questions_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., educator, student, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_assessments" (
  "user_assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-assessment link */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the user */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assessment was completed */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user started the assessment */,
  "time_taken" INTEGER /* Time taken by the user to complete the assessment in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_assessments_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_assessments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_assessment_answers" (
  "user_answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user answer */,
  "user_assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user-assessment link */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question */,
  "selected_option_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the selected option */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the selected option is correct */,
  "time_taken" INTEGER /* Time taken by the user to answer the question in seconds */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback for the user's answer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_assessment_answers_selected_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("selected_option_id") REFERENCES options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_assessment_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_assessment_answers_user_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_assessment_id") REFERENCES user_assessments ("user_assessment_id")
)
